memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: Scottish - Spelling variations of this family name include: Maule, Maull, Maul and others. First found in Yorkshire where they were seated from very early times and were granted lands by Duke William of Normandy, their liege Lord, for their distinguished assistance at the Battle of Hastings in 1066 C.E. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: Christopher Maul settled in New York in 1709; John George Maul settled in Philadelphia in 1754; Thomas Maul settled in New England in 1617; Casper Maule settled in Philadelphia in 1753. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009). Motto Translated: Clemency concealed under rigour.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mawle Jr.於1512年4月出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德時，他的父親Sir John Mawle I24歲，母親Christine Goodwyn Lady22歲。他於1540年與Margaret Abbes在英國英格蘭薩默塞特尼藍德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1579年9月5日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Mawle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mall
meanings: English: from the medieval female personal name Mall, a common form of Mald or Maud. See also Maude and Moll . It had several pet forms; see Malin , Malkin , and Mallet .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Mawle Jr. was born in April 1512, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John Mawle I, was 24 and his mother, Christine Goodwyn Lady, was 22. He married Margaret Abbes in 1540, in Nyland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 5 September 1579, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England.

Il a épousé Margaret Abbes en 1540, à Nyland, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1579, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ko.Stoke-by-Nayland, Babergh district, Suff: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드
ko.lifeSummary: John Mawle Jr.(이)가 1512년 4월 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Mawle I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Christine Goodwyn Lady(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 니랜드에서 Margaret Abbes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1579년 9월 5일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mawle Jr. nasceu em abril de 1512, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Mawle I, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Christine Goodwyn Lady, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Abbes em 1540, em Nyland, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.Stoke-by-Nayland, Babergh district, Suff: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mawle Jr. родился апрель 1512 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Mawle I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Christine Goodwyn Lady, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Abbes в 1540 г. в местности ниланд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 5 сентября 1579 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия.
